items.title: Incoming run (~6/15-17): 192 GR / 295 BUF / 330 FO cases — produced & weight-confirmed, NOT yet landed (stuck at Pueblo)
items.detail: Nathan's final counts (text 6/18): GR 192, BUF 295, FO 330 cases (817 total). CROSS-CONFIRMED by John's independent pallet measurements — per-SKU stack heights + weights line up (GR 34.6in/713lb, BUF 52in/1111lb, FO 59.1in/1211lb, ~3.7 lb/case across all three). This is INCOMING production, NOT sellable on-hand — current on-hand stays BUF 56 / FO 68 / GR 60 cs until it LANDS. On arrival (pickup date TBD — Jeremy/Liberty working the stuck-run freight, still unresolved; RLS's soonest is Friday which doesn't work for this run) convert to inventory via `node cotto-pipeline/log_receipt.js B 295 330 192 <date> <location>`. Batch sheets emailed per-SKU 6/18 for production-batch backup; 5/25-27 batch sheet (separate, mislabel run) attached to the 6/19 'Batch Sheets' email.
